artPrompt: The dramatic instant a hulking sludge-creature is wrenched mid-lunge onto a new path, a sweeping arc of sickly green bioluminescent light bending its trajectory toward a fresh target as rust-red runoff sprays from the reservoir. You can only point it, not stop it. Twisting rusted pipes frame the redirected charge under a bruised stormy sky. The curving motion sweeps up the wide frame. Wide 4:3 landscape, Gruul green and rust red, toxic menace, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Redirect the Menace
text: Change the target of target spell or ability with a single target to another target. If the creature being redirected has a sludge counter on it, you also put a sludge counter on it. You can't kill it; you can only point it.
flavorText: You can't stop the thing in the reservoir. You can only suggest a direction.
